title: Interface with a nested object property
description: nested object — outer + inner AND-chains; mion ObjectType "deep" subset
notes: Nested objects are validated recursively. Atomic-level rejections (NaN, Invalid Date) bubble up from the inner shape.
pureType: createValidate<{a: string; deep: {b: string; c: number}}>()
schema: createValidate(RT.object({a: RT.string(), deep: RT.object({b: RT.string(), c: RT.number()})}))
generated: function YOw_N1dRvxx(v){return (typeof v === 'object' && v !== null && typeof v.a === 'string' && (typeof v.deep === 'object' && v.deep !== null && typeof v.deep.b === 'string' && Number.isFinite(v.deep.c)))}
